recommendations.title: Vai Que Cola: O Filme
recommendations.overview: Valdomiro gets involved in yet another scheme, this time involving the same people that tricked him into losing everything - and he brings everyone from Ms. Jô's hostel along.

recommendations.title: Lulli
recommendations.overview: After getting electrocuted by an MRI machine, an ambitious young medical student begins to hear the thoughts of others.

recommendations.title: Airplane Mode
recommendations.overview: When Ana, an influencer, crashes her car while talking on the phone, she's shipped to her grumpy grandfather's farm -- and forced into a digital detox.

recommendations.title: Tangled
recommendations.overview: Feisty teenager Rapunzel, who has long and magical hair, wants to go and see sky lanterns on her eighteenth birthday, but she's bound to a tower by her overprotective mother. She strikes a deal with Flynn Rider, a charming wanted thief, and the duo s

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 3
recommendations.overview: Dona Hermínia will have to rediscover and reinvent herself because her children are forming new families. This supermom will have to deal with a new life scenario: Marcelina is pregnant and Juliano is getting married.

recommendations.title: Place publique
recommendations.overview: Revolves around Castro, who was once a very famous TV host, but as he grows old, his popularity is dwindling.

recommendations.title: Bingo: The King of the Mornings
recommendations.overview: 1980s. Brazilian television exploding in color and auditorium programs not so politically correct. In the middle of this fervor, Augusto Mendes, a young rising actor, seeks his place in the sun. From porn studios to soap operas, he finally finds succ

recommendations.title: Confessions of a Dangerous Mind
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Crime, Drama, Romance, Thriller, History
recommendations.overview: Television made him famous, but his biggest hits happened off screen. Television producer by day, CIA assassin by night, Chuck Barris was recruited by the CIA at the height of his TV career and trained to become a covert operative. Or so Barris said.

recommendations.title: Lo más sencillo es complicarlo todo
recommendations.overview: When a 17-year-old learns the TV news host she pines for is engaged, she and her best friend launch an elaborate plan to prevent his marriage.
